# nlohmann/json

- Upstream: <https://github.com/nlohmann/json>
- Pinned version: `v3.11.3`
- Vendored file: `include/nlohmann/json.hpp`
- License: MIT, see `LICENSE.MIT`

The single-header distribution is vendored so Host tests and RK3568 cross builds use the same JSON implementation without a target rootfs package dependency.
